---
title: "Pheast_brain"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Loading in Dataset

```{r}
# Load dataset

library(zellkonverter)

brain_sce <- readH5AD(
  "09971952-46c4-410c-8fb1-0afa7b0b225f.h5ad",
  use_hdf5 = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
# Basic object info
brain_sce

# Dimensions
dim(brain_sce)

# Assays
assayNames(brain_sce)

# Metadata column names
colnames(colData(brain_sce))

# Small metadata preview
as.data.frame(
  colData(brain_sce)[1:5, 1:10]
)

# Search for age/development columns
cat("\nPossible age/development columns:\n")

grep(
  "age|development|stage",
  colnames(colData(brain_sce)),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

# Search for disease/health columns
cat("\nPossible disease/health columns:\n")

grep(
  "disease|health|normal",
  colnames(colData(brain_sce)),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

# Search for tissue/organ columns
cat("\nPossible tissue/organ columns:\n")

grep(
  "tissue|organ|brain",
  colnames(colData(brain_sce)),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

# Search for cell annotation columns
cat("\nPossible cell annotation columns:\n")

grep(
  "cell|type|annot|cluster|class|subclass",
  colnames(colData(brain_sce)),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

# Search for donor/sample columns
cat("\nPossible donor/sample columns:\n")

grep(
  "donor|sample|patient|individual",
  colnames(colData(brain_sce)),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

# Gene metadata columns
cat("\nGene metadata columns:\n")

colnames(rowData(brain_sce))

# Small gene metadata preview
as.data.frame(
  rowData(brain_sce)[1:5, ]
)

# Preview gene rownames
head(rownames(brain_sce))
```

### QC:

```{r}
# =========================
# Brain dataset filter + QC
# =========================

library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scuttle)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)

# Brain dataset is already pediatric + normal based on metadata
brain_ped_healthy <- brain_sce

cat(
  "Cell count before QC:",
  ncol(brain_ped_healthy),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Number of donors:",
  length(unique(colData(brain_ped_healthy)$donor_id)),
  "\n"
)

cat("\nAges of donors:\n")
print(table(colData(brain_ped_healthy)$development_stage))

cat("\nDisease labels:\n")
print(table(colData(brain_ped_healthy)$disease))

# Gene names
brain_gene_names <- rownames(brain_ped_healthy)

# Mitochondrial genes
brain_is_mito <- grepl(
  "^MT-",
  brain_gene_names
)

# Ribosomal genes
brain_is_ribo <- grepl(
  "^RPL|^RPS",
  brain_gene_names
)

# Add QC metrics
brain_ped_healthy <- addPerCellQCMetrics(
  brain_ped_healthy,
  subsets = list(
    Mito = brain_is_mito,
    Ribo = brain_is_ribo
  ),
  assay.type = "X"
)

brain_qc_meta <- as.data.frame(
  colData(brain_ped_healthy)
)

# QC filters
brain_keep_qc <- brain_qc_meta$detected >= 200 &
                 brain_qc_meta$subsets_Mito_percent <= 20

brain_ped_healthy_qc <- brain_ped_healthy[
  ,
  brain_keep_qc
]

cat(
  "\nCell count after QC:",
  ncol(brain_ped_healthy_qc),
  "\n"
)

cat(
  "Cells removed during QC:",
  ncol(brain_ped_healthy) - ncol(brain_ped_healthy_qc),
  "\n"
)

cat("\nCell types after QC:\n")
print(
  sort(
    table(colData(brain_ped_healthy_qc)$cell_type),
    decreasing = TRUE
  )
)


```

```{r}
# =========================
# Brain dataset: check raw vs normalized, then normalize if needed
# =========================

library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scuttle)
library(Matrix)
library(DelayedArray)

brain_expr <- assay(
  brain_ped_healthy_qc,
  "X"
)

cat("Brain assay used: X\n")
cat("Expression matrix dimensions:\n")
print(dim(brain_expr))

# Sample a small part instead of pulling whole matrix into memory
set.seed(123)

brain_sample_values <- as.vector(
  as.matrix(
    brain_expr[
      sample(seq_len(nrow(brain_expr)), min(500, nrow(brain_expr))),
      sample(seq_len(ncol(brain_expr)), min(500, ncol(brain_expr)))
    ]
  )
)

brain_sample_values <- brain_sample_values[
  !is.na(brain_sample_values)
]

brain_nonzero_values <- brain_sample_values[
  brain_sample_values > 0
]

cat("\nSummary of sampled nonzero values:\n")
print(summary(brain_nonzero_values))

cat("\nAre sampled nonzero values integers?\n")

brain_all_integer <- all(
  abs(brain_nonzero_values - round(brain_nonzero_values)) < 1e-8
)

print(brain_all_integer)

if (brain_all_integer) {
  
  cat("\nInterpretation: brain X looks like raw counts.\n")
  cat("Normalizing with logNormCounts().\n")
  
  brain_ped_healthy_qc <- logNormCounts(
    brain_ped_healthy_qc,
    assay.type = "X",
    name = "logcounts"
  )
  
  brain_assay_to_use <- "logcounts"
  
} else {
  
  cat("\nInterpretation: brain X already looks normalized/log-transformed.\n")
  cat("Using X directly for heatmaps.\n")
  
  brain_assay_to_use <- "X"
}

cat("\nAssays now available:\n")
print(assayNames(brain_ped_healthy_qc))

cat("\nAssay selected for brain heatmaps:\n")
print(brain_assay_to_use)
```

### HeatMaps:

#### Broad:

```{r}
# Broad Cell Type Heatmap

library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c("CD24", "SIGLEC10")

expr_mat <- assay(
  brain_ped_healthy_qc,
  "X"
)

# Gene names
gene_col <- intersect(
  c(
    "gene_name",
    "gene_symbol",
    "symbol",
    "feature_name"
  ),
  colnames(
    rowData(brain_ped_healthy_qc)
  )
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) {

  gene_names <- rownames(
    brain_ped_healthy_qc
  )

} else {

  gene_names <- as.character(
    rowData(
      brain_ped_healthy_qc
    )[[gene_col]]
  )
}

meta <- as.data.frame(
  colData(
    brain_ped_healthy_qc
  )
)

keep_cells <- !is.na(meta$cell_type) &
              meta$cell_type != "" &
              !is.na(meta$donor_id)

meta <- meta[
  keep_cells,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

expr_mat <- expr_mat[
  ,
  keep_cells,
  drop = FALSE
]

# Broad brain cell classes
meta <- meta %>%
  mutate(
    broad_class = case_when(

      grepl(
        "excitatory|glutamatergic|projection",
        cell_type,
        ignore.case = TRUE
      ) ~ "Excitatory neuron",

      grepl(
        "inhibitory|gabaergic|interneuron",
        cell_type,
        ignore.case = TRUE
      ) ~ "Inhibitory neuron",

      grepl(
        "astrocyte",
        cell_type,
        ignore.case = TRUE
      ) ~ "Astrocyte",

      grepl(
        "oligodendrocyte",
        cell_type,
        ignore.case = TRUE
      ) ~ "Oligodendrocyte",

      grepl(
        "OPC",
        cell_type,
        ignore.case = TRUE
      ) ~ "OPC",

      grepl(
        "microglia|macrophage",
        cell_type,
        ignore.case = TRUE
      ) ~ "Microglia",

      grepl(
        "endothelial",
        cell_type,
        ignore.case = TRUE
      ) ~ "Endothelial",

      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  )

gene_idx <- match(
  genes_to_plot,
  gene_names
)

present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]

gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

expr_sub <- expr_mat[
  gene_idx,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

broad_classes <- unique(
  meta$broad_class
)

avg_mat <- sapply(
  broad_classes,
  function(ct) {

    cols <- which(
      meta$broad_class == ct
    )

    Matrix::rowMeans(
      expr_sub[, cols, drop = FALSE]
    )
  }
)

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)

heatmap_mat <- t(avg_mat)

label_df <- meta %>%
  group_by(broad_class) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(donor_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[
  match(
    rownames(heatmap_mat),
    label_df$broad_class
  ),
]

rownames(heatmap_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$broad_class,
  " (d=",
  label_df$d,
  ", n=",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

legend_max <- quantile(
  heatmap_mat,
  0.99,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(
    0,
    legend_max/2,
    legend_max
  ),
  c(
    "#2166AC",
    "#D0D0D0",
    "#B2182B"
  )
)

ht <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat,

  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",

  col = col_fun,

  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,

  row_names_side = "left",

  rect_gp = gpar(
    col = "white"
  ),

  row_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 10
  ),

  column_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 12,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),
  
  column_names_rot = 45,

  cell_fun = function(
    j, i, x, y,
    width, height,
    fill
  ) {

    val <- heatmap_mat[i, j]

    grid.text(
      sprintf("%.4f", val),
      x,
      y,
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 8)
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right"
)

png(
  "brain_CD24_SIGLEC10_broad.png",
  width = 2400,
  height = 2600,
  res = 220
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right"
)

dev.off()
```

#### Horizontal Long:

```{r}
# Horizontal Long Heatmap
# Brain detailed cell types ordered by broad lineage
# No category titles shown
# Presentation version: bigger bold text + higher resolution

library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c(
  "CD24",
  "SIGLEC10"
)

expr_mat <- assay(
  brain_ped_healthy_qc,
  "X"
)

gene_col <- intersect(
  c(
    "gene_name",
    "gene_symbol",
    "symbol",
    "feature_name"
  ),
  colnames(
    rowData(
      brain_ped_healthy_qc
    )
  )
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) {
  
  gene_names <- rownames(
    brain_ped_healthy_qc
  )
  
} else {
  
  gene_names <- as.character(
    rowData(
      brain_ped_healthy_qc
    )[[gene_col]]
  )
}

brain_horizontal_meta <- as.data.frame(
  colData(
    brain_ped_healthy_qc
  )
)

keep_cells <- !is.na(brain_horizontal_meta$cell_type) &
              brain_horizontal_meta$cell_type != "" &
              !is.na(brain_horizontal_meta$donor_id)

brain_horizontal_meta <- brain_horizontal_meta[
  keep_cells,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

expr_mat <- expr_mat[
  ,
  keep_cells,
  drop = FALSE
]

gene_idx <- match(
  genes_to_plot,
  gene_names
)

present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) {
  stop("Requested genes not found.")
}

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

expr_sub <- expr_mat[
  gene_idx,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

# ------------------------------------
# Order detailed brain cell types by broad lineage
# No category headers shown
# ------------------------------------

cell_types <- unique(
  brain_horizontal_meta$cell_type
)

cell_type_info <- data.frame(
  cell_type = cell_types,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cell_type_info$cell_group <- case_when(
  grepl(
    "glutamatergic|GABAergic|neuron|neuronal|interneuron|excitatory|inhibitory|CA1|CA2|CA3|dentate|granule",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Neurons",
  
  grepl(
    "astrocyte",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Astrocytes",
  
  grepl(
    "oligodendrocyte precursor|OPC|precursor",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Oligodendrocyte lineage",
  
  grepl(
    "oligodendrocyte",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Oligodendrocyte lineage",
  
  grepl(
    "microglia|macrophage|monocyte|myeloid",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Microglia / myeloid",
  
  grepl(
    "endothelial|vascular|capillary|arterial|venous",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Vascular",
  
  grepl(
    "pericyte|smooth muscle|mural",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Vascular",
  
  grepl(
    "ependymal|choroid",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Ependymal / choroid",
  
  grepl(
    "T cell|B cell|NK cell|lymphocyte|immune",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Immune",
  
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

group_order <- c(
  "Neurons",
  "Astrocytes",
  "Oligodendrocyte lineage",
  "Microglia / myeloid",
  "Vascular",
  "Ependymal / choroid",
  "Immune",
  "Other"
)

cell_type_info$cell_group <- factor(
  cell_type_info$cell_group,
  levels = group_order
)

# More specific ordering inside each group
cell_type_info$cell_type_order <- case_when(
  grepl("GABAergic|inhibitory|interneuron", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 1,
  grepl("glutamatergic|excitatory", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 2,
  grepl("CA1|CA2|CA3", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 3,
  grepl("dentate|granule", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 4,
  grepl("neuron", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 5,
  
  grepl("astrocyte", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 10,
  
  grepl("oligodendrocyte precursor|OPC", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 20,
  grepl("oligodendrocyte", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 21,
  
  grepl("microglia", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 30,
  grepl("macrophage|monocyte|myeloid", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 31,
  
  grepl("endothelial|capillary", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 40,
  grepl("pericyte|smooth muscle|mural", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 41,
  
  grepl("ependymal", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 50,
  grepl("choroid", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 51,
  
  grepl("T cell", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 60,
  grepl("B cell", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 61,
  grepl("NK cell", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 62,
  
  TRUE ~ 99
)

cell_type_info <- cell_type_info %>%
  arrange(
    cell_group,
    cell_type_order,
    cell_type
  )

cell_types_ordered <- cell_type_info$cell_type

# Average expression by ordered cell type

avg_mat <- sapply(
  cell_types_ordered,
  function(ct) {
    
    cols <- which(
      brain_horizontal_meta$cell_type == ct
    )
    
    Matrix::rowMeans(
      expr_sub[
        ,
        cols,
        drop = FALSE
      ]
    )
  }
)

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)

label_df <- brain_horizontal_meta %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(donor_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[
  match(
    cell_types_ordered,
    label_df$cell_type
  ),
]

colnames(avg_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_type,
  " (d=",
  label_df$d,
  ", n=",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

legend_max <- as.numeric(
  quantile(
    avg_mat,
    0.99,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(
    0,
    legend_max / 2,
    legend_max
  ),
  c(
    "#2166AC",
    "#D0D0D0",
    "#B2182B"
  )
)

ht <- Heatmap(
  avg_mat,
  
  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",
  
  col = col_fun,
  
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  
  rect_gp = gpar(
    col = "white",
    lwd = 1.2
  ),
  
  row_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 16,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),
  
  row_names_side = "left",
  
  column_names_side = "bottom",
  column_names_rot = 90,
  
  column_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 10,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),
  
  width = unit(
    46,
    "cm"
  ),
  
  height = unit(
    6,
    "cm"
  ),
  
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title_gp = gpar(
      fontsize = 14,
      fontface = "bold"
    ),
    labels_gp = gpar(
      fontsize = 12
    )
  ),
  
  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    
    val <- avg_mat[i, j]
    
    lab <- if (val < 0.005) {
      "0"
    } else {
      sprintf("%.3f", val)
    }
    
    grid.text(
      lab,
      x,
      y,
      gp = gpar(
        fontsize = 8,
        fontface = "bold",
        col = "black"
      )
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right"
)

png(
  "brain_CD24_SIGLEC10_horizontal_grouped_order_heatmap_presentation.png",
  width = 6000,
  height = 2400,
  res = 300
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right"
)

dev.off()
```

#### Vertical Long:

```{r}

# Vertical Long Heatmap
# Brain detailed cell types ordered by broad lineage
# No category titles shown
# Presentation version: bigger bold text + higher resolution

library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Matrix)
library(dplyr)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)

genes_to_plot <- c(
  "CD24",
  "SIGLEC10"
)

expr_mat <- assay(
  brain_ped_healthy_qc,
  "X"
)

gene_col <- intersect(
  c(
    "gene_name",
    "gene_symbol",
    "symbol",
    "feature_name"
  ),
  colnames(
    rowData(
      brain_ped_healthy_qc
    )
  )
)[1]

if (is.na(gene_col)) {
  
  gene_names <- rownames(
    brain_ped_healthy_qc
  )
  
} else {
  
  gene_names <- as.character(
    rowData(
      brain_ped_healthy_qc
    )[[gene_col]]
  )
}

brain_vertical_meta <- as.data.frame(
  colData(
    brain_ped_healthy_qc
  )
)

keep_cells <- !is.na(brain_vertical_meta$cell_type) &
              brain_vertical_meta$cell_type != "" &
              !is.na(brain_vertical_meta$donor_id)

brain_vertical_meta <- brain_vertical_meta[
  keep_cells,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

expr_mat <- expr_mat[
  ,
  keep_cells,
  drop = FALSE
]

gene_idx <- match(
  genes_to_plot,
  gene_names
)

present <- !is.na(gene_idx)

if (!any(present)) {
  stop("Requested genes not found.")
}

genes_present <- genes_to_plot[present]
gene_idx <- gene_idx[present]

expr_sub <- expr_mat[
  gene_idx,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

rownames(expr_sub) <- genes_present

# ------------------------------------
# Order detailed brain cell types by broad lineage
# No category headers shown
# ------------------------------------

cell_types <- unique(
  brain_vertical_meta$cell_type
)

cell_type_info <- data.frame(
  cell_type = cell_types,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cell_type_info$cell_group <- case_when(
  grepl(
    "glutamatergic|GABAergic|neuron|neuronal|interneuron|excitatory|inhibitory|CA1|CA2|CA3|dentate|granule",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Neurons",
  
  grepl(
    "astrocyte",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Astrocytes",
  
  grepl(
    "oligodendrocyte precursor|OPC|precursor",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Oligodendrocyte lineage",
  
  grepl(
    "oligodendrocyte",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Oligodendrocyte lineage",
  
  grepl(
    "microglia|macrophage|monocyte|myeloid",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Microglia / myeloid",
  
  grepl(
    "endothelial|vascular|capillary|arterial|venous",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Vascular",
  
  grepl(
    "pericyte|smooth muscle|mural",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Vascular",
  
  grepl(
    "ependymal|choroid",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Ependymal / choroid",
  
  grepl(
    "T cell|B cell|NK cell|lymphocyte|immune",
    cell_type_info$cell_type,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  ) ~ "Immune",
  
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

group_order <- c(
  "Neurons",
  "Astrocytes",
  "Oligodendrocyte lineage",
  "Microglia / myeloid",
  "Vascular",
  "Ependymal / choroid",
  "Immune",
  "Other"
)

cell_type_info$cell_group <- factor(
  cell_type_info$cell_group,
  levels = group_order
)

cell_type_info$cell_type_order <- case_when(
  grepl("GABAergic|inhibitory|interneuron", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 1,
  grepl("glutamatergic|excitatory", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 2,
  grepl("CA1|CA2|CA3", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 3,
  grepl("dentate|granule", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 4,
  grepl("neuron", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 5,
  
  grepl("astrocyte", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 10,
  
  grepl("oligodendrocyte precursor|OPC", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 20,
  grepl("oligodendrocyte", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 21,
  
  grepl("microglia", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 30,
  grepl("macrophage|monocyte|myeloid", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 31,
  
  grepl("endothelial|capillary", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 40,
  grepl("pericyte|smooth muscle|mural", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 41,
  
  grepl("ependymal", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 50,
  grepl("choroid", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 51,
  
  grepl("T cell", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 60,
  grepl("B cell", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 61,
  grepl("NK cell", cell_type_info$cell_type, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ 62,
  
  TRUE ~ 99
)

cell_type_info <- cell_type_info %>%
  arrange(
    cell_group,
    cell_type_order,
    cell_type
  )

cell_types_ordered <- cell_type_info$cell_type

# Average expression by ordered cell type

avg_list <- lapply(
  cell_types_ordered,
  function(ct) {
    
    cols <- which(
      brain_vertical_meta$cell_type == ct
    )
    
    Matrix::rowMeans(
      expr_sub[
        ,
        cols,
        drop = FALSE
      ]
    )
  }
)

avg_mat <- do.call(
  cbind,
  avg_list
)

avg_mat <- as.matrix(avg_mat)

rownames(avg_mat) <- genes_present
colnames(avg_mat) <- cell_types_ordered

heatmap_mat <- t(avg_mat)

label_df <- brain_vertical_meta %>%
  group_by(cell_type) %>%
  summarise(
    d = n_distinct(donor_id),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

label_df <- label_df[
  match(
    rownames(heatmap_mat),
    label_df$cell_type
  ),
]

valid <- !is.na(
  label_df$cell_type
)

heatmap_mat <- heatmap_mat[
  valid,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

label_df <- label_df[
  valid,
  ,
  drop = FALSE
]

rownames(heatmap_mat) <- paste0(
  label_df$cell_type,
  " (d=",
  label_df$d,
  ", n=",
  label_df$n,
  ")"
)

legend_min <- 0

legend_max <- as.numeric(
  quantile(
    heatmap_mat,
    probs = 0.99,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )
)

legend_mid <- legend_max / 2

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(
    legend_min,
    legend_mid,
    legend_max
  ),
  c(
    "#2166AC",
    "#D0D0D0",
    "#B2182B"
  )
)

ht <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat,
  
  name = "Mean expression\nlog(CPM/100 + 1)",
  
  col = col_fun,
  
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  
  rect_gp = gpar(
    col = "white",
    lwd = 1.2
  ),
  
  row_names_side = "left",
  
  row_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 12,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),
  
  row_names_max_width = unit(
    16,
    "cm"
  ),
  
  column_names_gp = gpar(
    fontsize = 16,
    fontface = "bold"
  ),
  
  column_names_rot = 45,
  
  width = unit(
    5.5,
    "cm"
  ),
  
  height = unit(
    22,
    "cm"
  ),
  
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title_gp = gpar(
      fontsize = 14,
      fontface = "bold"
    ),
    labels_gp = gpar(
      fontsize = 12
    )
  ),
  
  cell_fun = function(
    j, i, x, y,
    width, height,
    fill
  ) {
    
    val <- heatmap_mat[i, j]
    
    lab <- if (
      val < 0.005
    ) {
      "0"
    } else {
      sprintf("%.4f", val)
    }
    
    grid.text(
      lab,
      x,
      y,
      gp = gpar(
        fontsize = 9,
        fontface = "bold",
        col = "black"
      )
    )
  }
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right"
)

png(
  "brain_CD24_SIGLEC10_vertical_grouped_order_heatmap_presentation.png",
  width = 3400,
  height = 4200,
  res = 300
)

grid.newpage()

draw(
  ht,
  heatmap_legend_side = "right"
)

dev.off()
```
